infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Pakistani Tax Advisor uses the camera so you can photograph receipts to attach to expense records.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Pakistani Tax Advisor needs access to your photo library so you can attach receipt images to expense records.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Pakistani Tax Advisor saves downloaded return templates to your photo library for offline access.

plugins.photosPermission: Pakistani Tax Advisor needs access to your photo library so you can attach receipt images to expense records.
plugins.cameraPermission: Pakistani Tax Advisor needs access to your camera so you can photograph receipts for expense records.
